text: Hi, good evening — am I speaking with Deon?
Thanks. Before I can share anything, I just need to confirm I'm speaking with the right person — can you give me your date of birth, or the last four of your social?
Perfect, thank you, Deon.
This is an attempt to collect a debt, and any information obtained will be used for that purpose. This call may be recorded.
I'm calling about your Summit Bank Visa account. The current balance is one thousand two hundred eighty-four dollars and fifty-seven cents.
I understand, and that's completely okay. Are you able to take care of the full balance today?
No problem at all. We can split it into three or six monthly payments — would either of those help?
Great — that comes to about $214.10 a month. Could you make the first payment this Friday?
Thank you. I've set up a promise to pay $214.10 this Friday on a six-month plan. You'll get a confirmation by text.
Is there anything else I can help you with?
You're all set, Deon. Thanks for your time — take care. Goodbye.
